New Spring and Autumn Stone Island Metal Multi-Pocket Versatile Pants, Kanye's Metal Nylon Utility Pants, Unisex! Not at all stuffy! Personally, I think it's the most unique in the fashion silhouette. The fabric is not only breathable but also very special! Overall wrinkled effect, the silhouette can be said to be the best-looking among utility pants. It is the most special in the Stone Island product series, with a youthful and energetic design with cuffed ankles. The overall effect is a wrinkled effect, similar to the crumpled effect of aluminum foil. To control the precision of the embroidery and the consistency of each piece of embroidery, adjustments are needed for each embroidery work. The fabric weaving process is different from ordinary woven utility pants. Customization is done first, then the threads are woven into fabric before mass production. The use of Suhua threads to create a matte nylon thread, also known as nylon matte thread. The fabric itself has a reflective effect, unlike other utility pants fabrics! Colors: Black, Gray, Army Green. Sizes: M-XL. Waist, Hip, Length: M, L, XL, XXL, XXXL.

Stone Island Quick-Dry Ice Silk Breathable Casual Shorts are the perfect choice for a versatile pair of shorts that can be worn for both sports and leisure activities. Made with professional outdoor technology, these shorts redefine comfort and style. The selected ice-cool fabric provides excellent moisture-wicking properties, allowing for unrestricted movement during sports activities. The adjustable drawstring waist and tailored design enhance the fit and flatter various body shapes. The simple design in various colors makes it easy to pair with different styles, from sporty tank tops to casual shirts.
